# LiftGauge

> The honest training log for lifters who care about the numbers. Log sets in seconds, watch the graph climb, never wonder what you did last Tuesday again.

LiftGauge is a free, web-based gym tracking app (PWA) built for lifters who want a clean, fast logbook without ads, streaks-as-ransom, or social feeds. It works on any modern browser, installs to the home screen on iOS and Android, and syncs across devices.

## What it does

- **Log Session** — Tap, type, done. Last session's numbers prefill so you only enter what changed. Designed for one-thumb logging mid-set.
- **Log Book** — Every workout, every set, searchable. Edit history without breaking streaks.
- **Progress** — Per-exercise charts for total volume, top set, and estimated 1RM. Actual signal, not vanity metrics.
- **Library & Groups** — Build a personal exercise library. Group movements into routines you actually run.

## Principles

- No ads, ever.
- No dark patterns, no streaks held hostage.
- Your data stays yours — export anytime.
- Works offline (PWA); saves on reconnect.
- Free forever for core tracking.

## Tech

- Web app (PWA) built with React + Vite + TypeScript.
- Firebase for auth and data sync.
- Deployed on Vercel.

## Links

- [Home](https://gym-tracker-indol-iota.vercel.app/)
- [Sign in](https://gym-tracker-indol-iota.vercel.app/login)
